output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 3/3.
Batch 1: Implemented batch 1. Added `useSelectedShotIds`, added the compact `ShotsPanel`, and updated `useExternalDrop` to do image-first shot drops followed by `switchToFinalVideo()` when a final video exists. Verified with `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.test.tsx` and `npx tsc --noEmit`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/replace-the-preview-panel-in-20260406-1826/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Implemented batch 2. `VideoEditorShell` now adds a condensed `Shots` tab, defaults to `shots` off `/tools/travel-between-images` and `preview` on that route, passes `highlightedShotIds` from `useSelectedShotIds()` plus `projectId` from project context, and keeps the preview host mounted behind a CSS-hidden preview pane. Verified with `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/__tests__/PreviewPersistence.test.tsx` and `npx tsc --noEmit`. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/replace-the-preview-panel-in-20260406-1826/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Batch 3 verification completed. Required checks passed: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/__tests__/PreviewPersistence.test.tsx`, `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.test.tsx`, and `npx tsc --noEmit`. A temporary route/default-host reproduction test was run successfully and then deleted. The broader `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor` sweep was rerun with the current feature changes applied and still reports 4 failures in untouched files: `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipEditing.test.ts` (1 failure) and `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` (3 failures). Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/replace-the-preview-panel-in-20260406-1826/execution_batch_3.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `useSelectedShotIds` to derive highlighted shots from selected timeline clips. It resolves clip ids through `config.pinnedShotGroups` first, then falls back to `meta[clipId].asset -> registry.assets[assetKey].generationId` and a shot image generation lookup. Empty selections and missing data return an empty set safely.

Added `ShotsPanel` as a compact, horizontal-scrolling 2-row shots browser. It uses `useShots()` and `useShotFinalVideos(projectId)`, filters by case-insensitive shot name, supports a Related-only toggle, uses the exact shot drag payload shape with video generations filtered out, and stops keydown propagation from the search input. File length is 169 lines.

Updated `useExternalDrop` to preserve the existing image-based shot drop path, then call `switchToFinalVideo()` when `useShotFinalVideos(selectedProjectId)` contains a final video for the dropped shot. No export changes were needed from `useSwitchToFinalVideo`. The targeted drop test module now covers both the image-only path and the final-video follow-up path.

Updated `VideoEditorShell` to add a condensed `shots` tab, default it to `shots` off `/tools/travel-between-images` and `preview` on that route, pass `highlightedShotIds` from `useSelectedShotIds()` and `projectId` from `useProjectSelectionContext()`, and keep the condensed preview slot mounted behind a CSS-hidden preview pane so the Remotion host persists. The preview overlay is not rendered when the Shots tab is active. Preview persistence coverage was updated and passed.

Verification completed. `PreviewPersistence.test.tsx` passes, `useExternalDrop.test.tsx` passes with the final-video path covered, and `npx tsc --noEmit` passes. A temporary route/default-host reproduction test was run and then deleted. The broader `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor` sweep was rerun with the current changes applied and still reports 4 failures in untouched files: `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipEditing.test.ts` (1) and `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` (3). Those failures are outside the files changed for this feature and were not modified in this batch.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Verified both derivation paths: pinned groups are resolved first by clip id, and ungrouped clips fall back through asset generation ids to matching shot images. Empty selection or missing timeline data yields an empty highlighted set.

Verified `ShotsPanel.tsx` is 169 lines. Drag start uses `setShotDragData({ shotId, shotName, imageGenerationIds })` with video generations filtered out, and the search input stops keydown propagation.

Verified the drop flow remains image-first, then switches via `useSwitchToFinalVideo` only when `finalVideoMap.has(shot.id)`. The image-only path is unchanged when no final video exists, and the test module covers both behaviors.

Verified in code and test coverage that the preview host remains a single mounted DOM node while the compact shell defaults to the Shots tab off travel pages and the Preview tab on travel pages. The preview pane is CSS-hidden rather than unmounted, and the condensed branch skips rendering `previewOverlay` when `condensedRightPanel === 'shots'`.

Verified the required checks directly: `PreviewPersistence.test.tsx` passed, `useExternalDrop.test.tsx` passed with the video-path coverage in place, and `npx tsc --noEmit` completed without errors. The full `src/tools/video-editor` sweep was rerun afterward and still shows 4 unrelated failures in `useClipEditing.test.ts` and `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx`.
